target.profile_basis: RCH ts1 full fj-dispatch profile on 2026-06-06 ranked vmap_dot_i64/paired_vectors at 64.293 us [63.087,66.401], behind vmap_eigh and vmap_svd. Eigh had just failed frankenjax-ovzdc; SVD overlapped the IcyGlacier linalg track.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-dispatch-pass4-profile-rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.name: dense_i64_output_buffer
candidate.lever: Kept the direct paired-i64 vmap dot loop and changed only the output materialization from Vec<Literal> plus TensorValue::new to Vec<i64> plus TensorValue::new_i64_values.
candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-ifqsv-candidate-rch-target rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_dot_i64/paired_vectors --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
candidate.rejection_reason: Small midpoint improvement did not clear conservative same-worker proof; Score < 2.0.

behavior_isomorphism.reason_no_expanded_golden: The candidate failed the performance keep gate and was removed before commit.
preserved_surfaces: output order remains baseline because no source was kept
i64 wrapping multiplication and addition remain baseline because no source was kept
cache-key and evidence ledger behavior remain baseline because no source was kept

compile_gate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-ifqsv-check-rch-target rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-dispatch --all-targets

next_deeper_primitive.direction: Stop tuning the direct dot output wrapper; attack a structurally different primitive such as the batched gather/scatter data movement path or a larger compiled linalg artifact with clear ownership separation.
next_deeper_primitive.target_ratio: >=1.25x same-worker midpoint with conservative interval not worse than baseline
